## oak service logs

Show logs of a specific service instance

### Synopsis

Show the logs of a specific service instance.

  oak s logs <id|name> 0      show logs for instance 0
  -f / --follow               refresh every 5 seconds

```
oak service logs <service-id|name> <instance-number> [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -f, --follow   Refresh every 5 seconds
  -h, --help     help for logs
```
